scope.epistemic_boundary: A SAT result is an exact result only for the encoded abstract-distance subsystem. It is not a live Euclidean parent model.

status_legend.encoded: The active encoding contains the source consequence at the stated abstraction level.
status_legend.encoded_derived: The active encoding contains a theorem-derived consequence rather than the full parent field.
status_legend.partial: Only a strict weakening or projection is encoded.
status_legend.missing: A live parent field or necessary consequence is absent.
status_legend.slice: This is a deliberate exact-cardinality specialization, not the full live branch.
status_legend.external_gate_only: Tested only by a later incomplete gate, not by the main abstract-distance model.

constraints.note: At card 14 the three lower bounds and closed-cap sum force (5,6,6). The live parent only proves card at least 14.
A four-element non-self selected witness row is chosen at every carrier center.
Row-intersection, perpendicular-bisector alternation, cap-hit, strict triangle, and strict Kalmanson consequences are encoded; a planar rank-two strictly-convex realization is not.
Every source has a carrier-valued blocker distinct from itself; its exact selected support is the common row at that blocker and contains the source.
Every four-subset remaining after source deletion is forbidden from being one positive-radius class at that source's blocker.

constraints.active_location: allcenter_gate.py:one m[center,*] row shared by all sources mapping to center
constraints.note: Sources with the same blocker necessarily use the same exact support in the model.
Only the blocker-image consequence is retained; the deletion-survival content that proves it is not.
The model does not require K4 at FIRST_APEX after deletion of every carrier source. This is substantially stronger than merely excluding FIRST_APEX from the blocker image.
No named off-surplus first-apex co-radial pair, first-apex double deletion, second-apex double deletion, or origin-tagged common-deletion packet is retained.

One chosen witness digraph is forced strongly connected. The exact distance model is not checked for a proper K4-closed carrier subset, and full Minimal also quantifies over smaller convex K4 sets outside the carrier.
The current fixed (5,6,6) packet is not M44, but the live field forbids every alternative SurplusCapPacket on the same carrier.
The fixed contiguous blocks encode cap combinatorics, not common MEC-boundary equations, disk containment, the circumscribed branch, or the nonobtuse support-triangle inequalities.

The full class has cardinality five and every other positive-radius class at SECOND_APEX has cardinality at most three. This is correctly imposed on the original carrier, not only after erasing unused.
The strict physical-cap intersection has size three or four; the adjacent-cap counts match the two production cases.

constraints.active_location: allcenter_gate.py:296-298 only requires unused outside shell
constraints.note: The live unused source lies in PHYSICAL_CAP={0,1,2,3,4,5}; the active encoding permits any carrier point outside the exact-five shell.
The two distinct strict-physical shell roles, both unused-row omissions, the low-hit bound, and survival at the unused blocker and second apex are represented.
The seven equality orbits exhaust the relation between the ordered continuation pair and ordered mutual pair.
This is valid. It is unrelated to FullParentMutualEqualBlockerShell, whose equal blockers belong to the continuation unused source and a chosen mutual partner.

The CAS gate tests only selected-row and exact-five shell equality equations. It omits convex orientation, exact-filter inequalities, no_qfree inequalities, cap/MEC inequalities, minimality, and noM44. NONUNIT is not a Euclidean realization.
The active N=14 gate cannot close the uniform card-at-least-14 parent theorem by itself.

audit_verdict.labeling_bug: SAT_VERIFIED_SOURCE_FAITHFUL_ABSTRACT_DISTANCE_SHADOW overstates the encoded surface; use a retained-subsystem or partial-parent label.
